title: Effrikim worm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Effrikim worm''' was a two-headed worm that could grow up to three meters long.<ref name="Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children">''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]''</ref> Favored as a snack food by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], the endorphins of the effrikim worms brought on hours of drowsiness.

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 3: Duel at Shattered Rock]]''
